health_conditions: multiple partial elbow ligament tears confirmed by MRI (3 partial tears)

benefits.description: Used BPC both locally and systemically along with TB-500 for confirmed partial elbow ligament tears; noted visible gain in range of motion after TB injections
Some improvement in ROM over course of treatment with BPC and TB-500 combo

protocol_notes: Had 3 partial elbow ligament tears confirmed by MRI after initial ultrasound gave inconsistent results. Used BPC daily and TB-500 2x/week at higher doses. Noted visible ROM gains after TB injections. Believes synergy between BPC and TB-500 is well established for injuries. Source was lab-tested.
